title.en: But many secret medicines have some flaws, or s...

content.en:
If the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm wants to take the first path and let the Origin Ancestor on the other side complete the first awakening, it will be very difficult.

However, many Origin Upper Realm Overlords have continued to research and have also come up with some secret elixirs that can increase the success rate of awakening.

But many secret medicines have some flaws, or sequelae.

Without knowing it, no one dared to rashly use that secret medicine.

But if it is the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm whose strength cannot be improved for countless years, then it doesn't matter, he will definitely use this secret medicine.

There are only about two hundred Origin Upper Realm Overlords here, and it is estimated that there are only a few Origin Upper Realm Overlords who really need this secret medicine formula.

But soon, the Origin Upper Realm Overlord found a trading partner and went to talk about the transaction.

Ye Tian didn't have much interest in this secret medicine formula, after all, he hadn't figured out which path to take yet, and there was still a distance from this step!

There weren't many Origin Upper Realm Overlords who really traded in this exchange meeting, and many Origin Upper Realm Overlords came to gather and chat with other Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

"Everyone, I want to find a few Origin Upper Realm Overlords to cooperate with me to take out a reincarnation of the ruin creatures, who is interested?"

The one who spoke was the Origin Upper Realm Overlord Li Zu, who was a very powerful Origin Upper Realm Overlord who took the first path and completed the awakening of the Origin Ancestor Body on the other side twice.

Seeing that Li Zu was looking for cooperation, other Origin Upper Realm overlords came over.

At this time, an Origin Upper Realm Overlord said, "Ancestor, with your strength, you can't kill the other party, that reincarnation ruin creature must be very powerful, right?"

Li Zu did not hide it and revealed directly: "That reincarnation ruin creature is stronger than me, I need a few Origin Upper Realm overlords with similar strength to me, cooperate with me to besiege and kill them together, I will take out the Qingli secret medicine, one for each one." "

Green Secret Medicine!

As soon as they heard this reward, some of the Origin Upper Realm Overlords were moved.

After all, the Qingli Secret Elixir is a good thing, it helps the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm to complete an awakening of the Origin Ancestor on the other side, with a success rate of up to forty percent, and even has a certain effect on completing the second awakening.

This kind of secret medicine was also researched by Li Zu himself, and there were not many defects, and many Origin Upper Realm Overlords were eager for this secret medicine formula, but Li Zu was unwilling to sell it.

Moreover, Li Zu didn't have many Qingli secret medicines.

This time, Li Zu was willing to take out the Qingli Secret Medicine, and the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords were immediately moved.

Soon, there will be an Origin Upper Realm Overlord who will cooperate with Li Zu.

Ye Tian didn't participate in the cooperation, mainly because his strength was not good, and he was definitely not qualified to participate, and Lizu would not want it.

After a while, this exchange meeting ended.

Ye Tian still gained a lot in this exchange meeting, and traded several resources, all of which were traded with other Origin Upper Realm overlords using the resources he found.

In addition, he also knew a lot of secrets, and his knowledge broadened a lot.

......

After the exchange meeting, Ye Tian went to find Yan Zu and prepared to talk to Yan Zu again.

"Smoke Ancestor, do you know what the mysterious existence is in the dark mist?"

Ye Tian asked directly.

He was very curious about this, and he always wanted to know that an Origin Upper Realm overlord like Yan Zu must know.

Really.

Yan Zu did know.

"Lord of Endless, the creature in the dark mist is a creature of the ruins of reincarnation - the mist ancient turtle, an incomparably terrifying existence, it usually sleeps, as long as it does not provoke it, it is not a big problem, but once it angers it, it will be killed by it. Yanzu said.

"Yan Ancestor, what is the strength of the Void Mist Ancient Turtle?"

Ye Tian asked again.

Yan Zu said lightly: "The strength of the Void Mist Ancient Turtle is not easy to say, the strength of each Void Mist Ancient Turtle is different, currently in the Ruins of Reincarnation, a total of three Void Mist Ancient Turtles have been discovered, and the weakest one of them is equivalent to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has completed the awakening of the Origin Ancestor Body on the other side seven times!"

"The Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has awakened the Origin Ancestor Body on the other side seven times!, or the weakest one?"

Ye Tian didn't know how powerful the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who had awakened the Origin Ancestor Body on the other side seven times, after all, he hadn't seen it.

"Is there such an Origin Upper Realm Overlord in our Eternal Otherland?" Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Yan Zu nodded, "It's just very few, maybe I haven't even seen it." In the land of eternity, there are actually some incomparably ancient Origin Upper Realm overlords, these Origin Upper Realm overlords are still really at the limit of their strength, and they can't make any progress, and they have lost hope, so they seal themselves or fall asleep, waiting for endless years, and the juniors can study a new path, and they will wake up. For example, there is such a person in Zhentian Realm City, who has reached the level of seven awakenings of the Origin Ancestor on the other side, and I have never seen it. "

"Got it!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The water in the land of the Eternal Shore is very deep, it is not as simple as he thought, maybe there is such a terrifying existence hidden in the east of the land of the Eternal Shore, but no one can find it.

By chatting with Yan Zu, he knew that not only the ruins of reincarnation, but even the land on the other side of eternity, there were such terrifying creatures with very terrifying strength, they had no wisdom, but they were powerful, even they didn't dare to provoke, and tried not to offend.

Of course.

This creature usually doesn't cause trouble, and even if it can rush out of some treasure land, it won't come out.

Once you do kill in the land of eternity, an ancient being awakens from its slumber, kills this powerful creature, and then sleeps again.

So.

The Land of the Eternal Shores is still fairly stable, and there have been no major problems.

After separating from Yanzu, Ye Tian returned to Fengya Island and started a relatively long period of penance.

this day.

Ye Tian's other side of the origin rule broke through, reaching the ninety out of eight realm.

And with the breakthrough of the rules of the other side's origin, his other's origin has also improved a bit, and his strength has improved a lot.

However, the Origin Rules of the Other Shore are not high, and some of them may reach this level if they have not yet broken through to the top of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

Like those overlords of the Upper Realm on the other side who have completed their awakening or broken the boundary of the origin of the other side, they have all raised the rules of the origin of the other side to the realm of ten percent, and his current realm is really a little insufficient, and he has to continue to improve his strength.

Fortunately, he obtained enough resources last time, even if the resource grade is not good, but if he slowly cultivates and improves, he can still improve the origin rules of the other side.

And.

He has now broken through to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and he can go to the Ruins of Reincarnation to find resources at any time, and he can definitely raise the Origin Rules on the other side to the realm of ten percent!
